transcript: Speaker A: ippol English edan na kalakki chirikkanamada, it's only been 15 days on this app, now I can speak better English than you guys. [Laugh now, laugh at my English now, it's only been 15 days on this app, now I can speak better English than you guys.] Speaker B: Just 15 days? Wow, very fluent English! Speaker C: Adhe enna aap pannurathu? [Which app is that, bro?] Speaker A: SpeakX app, ithu AI English teaching app aanu, ithu nammal English padikkan help cheyyunnu. [SpeakX app, this is an AI English teaching app, it helps us learn English.] Speaker A: Ningal time waste cheythirunnappol njan daily 10-15 minute ee appil English practice cheythirunnu. [While you were wasting time, I practiced English on this app for 10-15 minutes daily.] Speaker A: ithoru AI teacher aanu, samsarikkumbolo allenkil mistakes cheyyumbolo enikku oru pedi illa, karanam enthu mistakes cheythalum ithu udane correct cheythu tharunnu. [This is an AI teacher, I have no fear when speaking or making mistakes, because whatever mistakes I make, it corrects them immediately.] Speaker A: Oru ee appilokkum. [Come, look at this app.] Speaker C: Hello ma'am, njangellam English samsarikkan padikkanu. [Hello ma'am, we also want to learn to speak English.] Speaker D: sheri, ningalude free time-il ente koode English samsarikkan practice thudangoo. Rahul-inepole ningaludeyum English 15 muthal 20 divasathinullil fluent aayi maarum. [Okay, start practicing speaking English with me in your free time. Like Rahul, your English will also become fluent within 15 to 20 days.] Speaker B: Wow, Ee AI Teacher nallathallo, enikkum arshan pole English vedi. [Wow, this AI Teacher is good, I also want to speak English like Arshan.] Speaker A: Ee app jeevitham maatti, ippol ellavarum enikku respect thannundu, SpeakX download cheyyu. [This app changed my life, now everyone respects me, you also download SpeakX.]
on_screen_text: ippol English edan na kalakki chirikkanamada, 15 days on this app, now I can speak better English than you guys. Just 15 days? Wow, very fluent English! Adhe enna aap pannurathu? SpeakX app, ithu AI English teaching app aanu, ithu nammal English padikkan help cheyyunnu. Ningal time waste cheythirunnappol njan daily 10-15 minute ee appil English practice cheythirunnu. ithoru AI teacher aanu samsarikkumbolo allenkil mistakes cheyyumbolo enikku oru pedi illa karanam enthu mistakes cheythalum ithu udane correct cheythu tharunnu. Oru ee appilokkum Hello ma'am, njangellam English samsarikkan padikkanu. sheri, ningalude free time-il ente koode English samsarikkan practice thudangoo. Rahul-inepole ningaludeyum English 15 muthal 20 divasathinullil fluent aayi maarum. Wow, Ee AI Teacher nallathallo, enikkum arshan pole English vedi. Ee app jeevitham maatti, ippol ellavarum enikku respect thannundu, SpeakX download cheyyu.
summary: A young woman surprises two men with her fluent English, explaining she learned it in just 15 days using the SpeakX AI app. She demonstrates the interactive AI teacher, which corrects mistakes instantly. The ad ends with a call to action to download SpeakX to gain respect and improve English skills.
